---
code: chu
name: Old Church Slavonic
family: South Slavic
scripts: [Cyrs, Glag]
provenance:
  exported: 2026-07-14 (ledger language_notes + seed yml)
---
The OCS canon, 9th–11th c.: Codex Marianus, Suprasliensis, and the four
CCMH gospel manuscripts. Wiktionary-OCS (4.6k entries) glosses it; its
etymology edges arrive under Wiktionary's code "cu".
